context: Evaluate a generated reading-list.base file. The base must use a cards view, define a guarded reading-time formula, group by status, and include a stats table view.

checklist.name: Book tag filter present
checklist.description: The global filters include file.hasTag("book") to scope the base to book-tagged notes.

checklist.name: Cards view used
checklist.description: The primary view has type: cards, not type: table or type: list.

checklist.name: reading_time formula defined in formulas section
checklist.description: A formula (any name) that computes estimated reading time from pages is defined under the top-level formulas key.

checklist.name: reading_time formula guards against missing pages
checklist.description: The formula wraps the pages arithmetic in if(pages, ..., "") or equivalent to handle notes without a pages property.

checklist.name: Cards view groups by status
checklist.description: The cards view includes a groupBy clause that groups by the status property.

checklist.name: file.basename used in order (not file.name)
checklist.description: The order list in both views uses file.basename rather than file.name for displaying note titles.

checklist.name: Stats table view present with Sum summary
checklist.description: A second view of type table named "Stats" (or similar) is present, includes the reading-time formula in its order list, and applies a Sum summary to the pages column.

checklist.name: Valid YAML structure
checklist.description: The output is syntactically valid YAML. All special characters in strings are quoted. Indentation is consistent.
